# OpenClaw Setup

> OpenClaw Setup is a done-for-you AI assistant deployment service. Get OpenClaw (open-source AI platform) running on your own infrastructure with full integration in under a week.

OpenClaw is an open-source AI assistant platform that goes beyond chatbots - it reasons autonomously, runs complex workflows, connects to business tools, and operates 24/7 across messaging platforms.

This site is for the setup service - not DIY. Jess Mason handles the full deployment including discovery, architecture, integration, security hardening, and training.

## Main Page

- / : Overview of OpenClaw setup service, what's included, pricing, and how to book

## What's Included

- Full OpenClaw deployment on dedicated Mac Mini or VPS
- Integration with CRM, email, calendar, messaging (WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord)
- Security hardening
- Custom prompt engineering
- Training and handoff
- Ongoing support

## Pricing

Starting at $1,997 for barebones setup. Priced by the value of the role being replaced, not hours.
